author: shabbirpatheria
description: Render a checklist in your daily note from a folder structure. Checking an item logs the daily note's date into that note's 'entries' property. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: shabbirpatheria
manifest.description: Render a checklist in your daily note from a folder structure. Checking an item logs the daily note's date into that note's 'entries' property.
manifest.name: Pixel Habits

name: Pixel Habits

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Sticky habit names + default scroll position

- Habit names are now a **sticky, fully opaque column** — the day boxes scroll behind them and long names stay completely visible
- The stats heatmap now **starts scrolled to the far right**, showing the most recent days (including today) by default

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Fix touch scrolling on the stats board

- Stats heatmap cells now use **tap detection** — scrolling on touch devices no longer accidentally checks habits, and the board scrolls freely in both directions
- Only a deliberate tap (with minimal movement) toggles a cell

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Stats board fixes

- Heatmap cells now toggle on a **single click** (fixed an off-by-one caused by a stale metadata cache; added optimistic UI and a cache-sync wait)
- Heatmap cells stay **perfectly square** on small screens
- The stats board is now **horizontally scrollable** on small screens
- Fixed **box overlap** at the week 2/3 boundaries (proper spacer columns)
- Removed the today-column yellow border

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Rename to Pixel Habits

- Changed the plugin's display name to **Pixel Habits** (plugin id unchanged, so existing installs and settings are unaffected)
- Updated README title and Community browser search reference

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## routine-stats board + RPG UI polish

### Added
- **`routine-stats` board** — add a JRPG-style character stats screen to any note (or use the *Insert routine stats board* command). One board per folder over the last 21 days:
  - Header with level, current streak, and rank badge
  - Quick stats, completion HUD bar, and a color-coded heatmap
  - Weekly milestones, a pixel trend sparkline, lifetime stats, and collectible achievement badges
- **Clickable heatmap cells** — click any day to log/remove a completion; writes to `entries` and fans out to subtasks, updating live
- **Order-based section colors** (Blue, Amber, Green, Red, Purple) that cycle and restart per parent section

### Changed
- Neutral default section icon; removed hardcoded per-folder emojis
- Various 16-bit RPG UI polish and light/dark fixes
- Updated README; removed the Habit Tracker 21 reference

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## 16-bit RPG menu redesign

A full visual overhaul that turns the habit checklist into a retro RPG status menu.

### Added
- RPG-style section headers with pixel bevels, double borders, and category flag icons
- Pixel dropdown arrows (\u25BA / \u25BC) for collapse/expand
- Block-based HP/XP progress bars with a QUESTS HUD counter
- Numbered, inventory-style task rows with pixel checkboxes
- Tree connectors (\u251C\u2500\u2500 / \u2514\u2500\u2500) for nested subtasks
- Selected-row pixel cursor, +XP popups, sparkle bursts, and a Quest Complete banner
- Order-based section colors (Blue, Amber, Green, Red, Purple) that cycle and restart per parent section

### Improved
- Light and dark palettes tuned for contrast and balance
- Denser layout, deeper pixel depth, chunkier progress bars
- `prefers-reduced-motion` support

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Habit Checklist 1.1.1

### Fixed
- **Backfill parent dates into subtasks.** When a routine note gained subtasks *after* its parent was already checked on some dates, those historical `entries` dates were never propagated to `subtaskEntries`, so the parent and subtasks rendered unchecked despite `entries` still claiming the date. On render, the plugin now unions every parent `entries` date into each subtask (idempotent — it only writes when a date is actually missing, never removes dates).

### Docs
- Documented that this plugin is a complementary companion to the [Habit Tracker 21](https://github.com/zoreet/habit-tracker) plugin, sharing the same `entries` property.

**Install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/folder-routines/`.

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
## Subtasks

Routine notes can now declare a `subtasks` frontmatter list. Each subtask renders as a nested checkbox under the habit.

- Completing **all** subtasks auto-completes the parent habit and logs the daily note's date into `entries`.
- Unchecking any subtask auto-unchecks the parent and removes that date.
- Toggling the parent checkbox toggles **all** subtasks at once.
- Per-subtask completion is stored in a new plugin-managed `subtaskEntries` property, so state survives reloads.
- Two new settings: **Subtasks property** (default `subtasks`) and **Subtask entries property** (default `subtaskEntries`).

Fully backward compatible: notes without a `subtasks` property behave exactly as before.

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description: Rename the plugin's display name to "Habit Checklist". Plugin id, code block language (```routines), and commands are unchanged, so existing installs and notes keep working.

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description: Set minAppVersion to 1.4.4 (required by the processFrontMatter API).

releases.author: shabbirpatheria
releases.description:
Initial release of Folder Routines.

- Folder-based checklist rendered in daily notes via a `routines` code block
- Collapsible sections with a top-level Habits toggle
- Checking an item logs the daily note's date into that note's `entries` frontmatter; unchecking removes it
- Strikethrough on checked items
